prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜约第80名（合肥工业大学本部），属全国中上游水平，近年排名稳中有升；2025年声誉偏负面，主要因热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考；2026年声誉仍偏负面，涉及学术不端事件；抖音热度排名第77位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等偏低，报考关注度不算突出；管理科学与工程为A级学科（第五轮评估），是该校唯一A类学科；机械工程、材料科学与工程等工科实力较强，与宣城校区开设的机械工程、新能源材料与器件、电气工程与智能控制等专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，对宣城校区工科专业报考有正向拉动；河北省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，较2025年略有增加，物理类考生规模估算约36.5万人，竞争小幅加剧；合肥工业大学（宣城校区）位于安徽省宣城市，属长三角腹地，对河北考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在河北招生计划占比较高，属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准34450名、2026年小幅扩招4%、考生规模略增、工科专业热度持续高位但学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在35277名基础上小幅上调至约35327名，区间34827–35827名。扩招带来的竞争加剧与工科热度是主要上移推力，声誉偏负面有一定抑制但幅度有限。

- 电气工程与智能控制
- 机械工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 材料成型及控制工程。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约35327名，区间34827–35827名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如34000名以内）可重点冲刺软件工程、电气工程与智能控制等热门工科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 47376 → 26529 → 45627 → 35924 → 34450, showing significant fluctuations: a large forward shift in 2022 followed by a notable backward shift in 2023, with continuous forward shifts in recent years (2024: 35924 → 2025: 34450). The baseline for 2025 is approximately 34450. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 102 in 2021, 100 in 2022, 101 in 2023, 98 in 2024, and 100 in 2025, generally stable around 100. The 2026 plan is 104, a slight 4% expansion compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th on the Soft Science main list (Hefei University of Technology main campus), placing it at the upper-middle level nationally, with a steadily rising ranking in recent years. In 2025, its reputation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors with no applicants. In 2026, the reputation remains somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with a rating of 'average,' and short video exposure is moderately low, so application attention is not particularly prominent. Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round evaluation), the only A-class discipline at the university. Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and other engineering disciplines are relatively strong, closely related to majors offered at the Xuancheng Campus, such as Mechanical Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices, and Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, positively influencing applications for engineering majors at the Xuancheng Campus. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Hebei Province is approximately 609,800, a slight increase from 2025, with an estimated Physics Category candidate scale of about 365,000, leading to slightly intensified competition. Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, in the hinterland of the Yangtze River Delta, offering some regional appeal to Hebei candidates. The university has a relatively high proportion of enrollment plans in Hebei, making it a key province for out-of-province student recruitment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline of 34450, a slight 4% expansion in 2026, a slight increase in candidate numbers, sustained high popularity of engineering majors, but a somewhat negative university reputation, the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is expected to be slightly adjusted upward from 35277 to approximately 35327, with a range of 34827–35827. The intensified competition from expansion and the popularity of engineering majors are the main upward forces, while the somewhat negative reputation has a certain dampening effect but is limited.

- Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control
- Mechanical Engineering.

- Materials Forming and Control Engineering.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 35327, range 34827–35827. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates significantly above the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 34000) can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Software Engineering and Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3394 → 3426 → 4468 → 4175 → 4745, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1351 positions over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 4745; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 6 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 14 in 2025, showing a year-by-year expansion; the 2026 plan is 10, a reduction of about 28.6% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking approximately 80th (Hefei University of Technology main campus), at the upper-middle level nationally; reputation in 2025 was somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors), and still somewhat negative in 2026 (academic misconduct incidents); Douyin popularity ranking 77th, rated 'average', with limited impact on liberal arts major applications; Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, not directly related to liberal arts majors at Xuancheng Campus.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of foreign language majors is generally wait-and-see; the Network and New Media major is affected by the 'journalism and communication strongly discouraged' trend, with low popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province general college entrance examination is about 609,800, with an estimated History Category candidate size of about 245,000, a slight increase compared to 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline of 4745, the significant enrollment reduction of about 28.6% in 2026, and the relatively cold popularity of foreign language and new media majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly decrease from 3932 to about 3882, with a range of 3382–4382. The enrollment reduction is the core factor driving the ranking forward (decrease in number), while the slight increase in candidate numbers and the cold popularity of liberal arts majors have some offsetting effect.
